name: Jiao Jiao
page_title: Jiao Jiao “Zhengqiang” 焦矯 “征羌” – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Jiao Jiao was head of a powerful local family and Magistrate of Zhengqiang. For this reason he became known as Jiao Zhengqiang (1). During the 190s Bu Zhi and Wei Jing, impoverished refugees from the north, called upon him. He made them wait and then fed them plain food while he feasted. This angered Wei Jing, but Bu Zhi accepted the discourtesy as an honest reflection of his presently humble position. (2)

1) You will see him referenced by this nickname.

2) Sanguozhi: Wu 7

full_text:
Jiao Jiao “Zhengqiang” 焦矯 “征羌”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiao Jiao (焦矯)aka“Zhengqiang” (征羌)was born in Kuaiji. Head of a powerful family in Runan. Treated Bu Zhi poorly when he came for aid.
